ddls:
CREATE TABLE "neighborhoods" (
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each neighborhood */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the neighborhood */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the neighborhood */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the neighborhood */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the neighborhood is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the neighborhood is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the neighborhood */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the neighborhood */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the neighborhood */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* ID of the neighborhood the demographic data belongs to */,
  "crim" REAL /* Crime rate per capita */,
  "zn" REAL /* Proportion of residential land zoned for lots over 25,000 sq.ft. */,
  "indus" REAL /* Proportion of non-retail business acres per town */,
  "chas" REAL /* Charles River dummy variable (1 if tract bounds river; 0 otherwise) */,
  "nox" REAL /* Nitrogen oxide concentration (parts per 10 million) */,
  "rm" REAL /* Average number of rooms per dwelling */,
  "age" REAL /* Proportion of owner-occupied units built prior to 1940 */,
  "dis" REAL /* Weighted distances to five Boston employment centers */,
  "rad" REAL /* Index of accessibility to radial highways */,
  "tax" REAL /* Full-value property-tax rate per $10,000 */,
  "avg_family_size" REAL /* Average family size */,
  "avg_household_income" REAL /* Average household income */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "housing_prices" (
  "housing_price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each housing price record */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* ID of the neighborhood the housing price belongs to */,
  "medv" REAL /* Median house price in $1000s */,
  "price" REAL /* Actual house price */,
  "year_sold" INTEGER /* Year the house was sold */,
  "num_bedrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms */,
  "num_bathrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bathrooms */,
  "sq_footage" INTEGER /* Square footage of the house */,
  "type_of_property" TEXT /* Type of property (e.g., single-family, condo, townhouse) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("housing_price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_housing_prices_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment" (
  "employment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employment record */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* ID of the neighborhood the employment data belongs to */,
  "ptratio" REAL /* Pupil-teacher ratio by town */,
  "emp_rate" REAL /* Employment rate */,
  "avg_commute_time" REAL /* Average commute time */,
  "avg_annual_salary" REAL /* Average annual salary */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environmental_factors" (
  "environmental_factor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environmental factor record */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* ID of the neighborhood the environmental data belongs to */,
  "nox_level" REAL /* Nitrogen oxide level */,
  "water_quality" TEXT /* Water quality rating */,
  "air_quality" TEXT /* Air quality rating */,
  "pollution_index" REAL /* Pollution index */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("environmental_factor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_factors_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "socioeconomic_data" (
  "socioeconomic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each socioeconomic record */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* ID of the neighborhood the socioeconomic data belongs to */,
  "lstat" REAL /* % lower status of the population */,
  "income_level" TEXT /* Income level */,
  "edu_level" TEXT /* Education level */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("socioeconomic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_socioeconomic_data_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* ID of the neighborhood being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "action_performed" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view report, edit data) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* ID of the neighborhood the report is for */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., housing price analysis, demographic analysis) */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., pending, completed, error) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_districts" (
  "school_district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school district */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* ID of the neighborhood the school district belongs to */,
  "school_district_name" TEXT /* Name of the school district */,
  "school_district_rating" REAL /* Rating of the school district */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_school_districts_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transportation" (
  "transportation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transportation option */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* ID of the neighborhood the transportation option belongs to */,
  "transportation_type" TEXT /* Type of transportation (e.g., bus, train, subway) */,
  "distance_to_public_transport" REAL /* Distance to the nearest public transportation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transportation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transportation_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "zoning_regulations" (
  "zoning_regulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each zoning regulation */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* ID of the neighborhood the zoning regulation belongs to */,
  "zoning_regulation" TEXT /* Zoning regulation */,
  "zoning_category" TEXT /* Zoning category (e.g., residential, commercial) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("zoning_regulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_zoning_regulations_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_rates" (
  "crime_rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime rate */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* ID of the neighborhood the crime rate belongs to */,
  "crime_type" TEXT /* Type of crime (e.g., violent, property) */,
  "crime_rate" REAL /* Crime rate per 1000 residents */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crime_rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_rates_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)
